stages.concept:
# Unit 142: 분사구문 만드는 법 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **분사구문 만드는 법**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 분사구문은 부사절을 **간결하게** 줄인 것이에요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 만드는 법 3단계:

> 1. **접속사** 생략
> 2. 부사절과 주절의 **주어가 같으면** 부사절 주어 생략
> 3. 동사를 **-ing** 형태로 변환

👩‍🏫 선생님: 예시:

> **When** she **heard** the news, she was surprised. (부사절)
> → ~~When~~ ~~she~~ **Hearing** the news, she was surprised. (분사구문)
> 그 소식을 들었을 때, 그녀는 놀랐다.

> **Because** I **was** tired, I went to bed early.
> → ~~Because~~ ~~I~~ **Being** tired, I went to bed early.
> 피곤해서 나는 일찍 잠자리에 들었다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **부정 분사구문**: Not/Never + -ing

> **Not knowing** what to do, I asked for help.
> 무엇을 해야 할지 몰라서, 나는 도움을 요청했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **수동 분사구문**: (Being) + p.p. (Being 생략 가능)

> **(Being) Written** in English, the book is hard to read.
> 영어로 쓰여 있어서, 그 책은 읽기 어렵다.

**Q. 다음 부사절을 분사구문으로 바르게 고친 것을 고르세요.**
"Because he didn't have enough money, he couldn't buy the car."
1. Not having enough money, he couldn't buy the car. ✅
2. Didn't have enough money, he couldn't buy the car.
3. Not had enough money, he couldn't buy the car.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 훌륭해요! 접속사(Because)와 주어(he)를 지우고, 동사(have)를 -ing로 만들되, 부정의 의미가 있었으므로 분사 앞에 Not을 붙여서 'Not having'을 만들어 주는 것이 맞습니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 접속사 빼고, 같은 주어 빼고, 동사를 -ing로! 부정은 Not -ing, 수동은 (Being) p.p. 3단계로 간단하네요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 142: 분사구문 만드는 법 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
Because I was tired, I went to bed early.
→ (     ) tired, I went to bed early.
> **정답** Being

---

**02.** As she didn't know his number, she couldn't call him.
→ (     ) his number, she couldn't call him.
> **정답** Not knowing

---

**03.** When he finished his homework, he watched TV.
→ (     ) his homework, he watched TV.
> **정답** Finishing (Having finished)

---

**04.** Because she was sick, she stayed home.
→ (     ) sick, she stayed home.
> **정답** Being

---

**05.** While I walked to school, I met my friend.
→ (     ) to school, I met my friend.
> **정답** Walking

---

**06.** 접속사절을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
Because I was hungry, I ate some bread.
> **정답** Being hungry, I ate some bread.

---

**07.** As she studied hard, she passed the test.
> **정답** Studying hard, she passed the test.

---

**08.** When he opened the door, he saw a cat.
> **정답** Opening the door, he saw a cat.

---

**09.** Because she didn't have money, she walked home.
> **정답** Not having money, she walked home.

---

**10.** While I listened to music, I fell asleep.
> **정답** Listening to music, I fell asleep.

---

**11.** 분사구문을 접속사절로 바꾸시오.
Being tired, I took a nap.
> **정답** Because I was tired, I took a nap.

---

**12.** Walking in the park, she met her friend.
> **정답** While she was walking in the park, she met her friend.

---

**13.** Not knowing the answer, he asked the teacher.
> **정답** Because he didn't know the answer, he asked the teacher.

---

**14.** Finishing dinner, she washed the dishes.
> **정답** After she finished dinner, she washed the dishes.

---

**15.** Being sick, he couldn't go to school.
> **정답** Because he was sick, he couldn't go to school.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
피곤해서 일찍 잤다.
Being tired went I to bed early
> **정답** Being / tired / I / went / to / bed / early

---

**17.** 문을 열자 고양이를 보았다.
Opening the door saw he a cat
> **정답** Opening / the / door / he / saw / a / cat

---

**18.** 길을 모르기 때문에 물어보았다.
Not the knowing way asked she for help
> **정답** Not / knowing / the / way / she / asked / for / help

---

**19.** 음악을 들으며 공부했다.
Listening music to I studied
> **정답** Listening / to / music / I / studied

---

**20.** 아파서 학교에 못 갔다.
Being he sick couldn't go to school
> **정답** Being / sick / he / couldn't / go / to / school
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 142: 분사구문 만드는 법 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
If you arrive at the cafe, you will find us there.
___________ at the cafe, you will find us there.
Arriving
To arrive
Arrived
Arrive
> **정답** Arriving

---

**02.** 다음 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Being tired, I didn't go on a picnic last weekend.
Though I was tiring, I don't go on a picnic last
weekend.
Because I was tired, I didn't go on a picnic last
weekend.
Though I was tired, I didn't go on a picnic last
weekend.
Because I am tired, I didn't go on a picnic last
weekend.
> **정답** Because I was tired, I didn't go on a picnic last weekend.

---

**03.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Although she had a hard time, she helped other
people.
she having a hard time
Had a hard time
Have a hard time
Having a hard time
> **정답** Having a hard time

---

**04.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
When she didn't work in the office, she listened to
music.
__________________________________, she listened
to music.
Working not in the office.
Working in the office.
Not working in the office.
Not work in the office.
> **정답** Not working in the office.

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Catching a cold, he was absent from school.
That he caught a cold
And he caught a cold
Although he caught a cold
Because he caught a cold
> **정답** Because he caught a cold

---

**06.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
As soon as I found him, I called him out.
I finding him
Found him
Finding him
I found him
> **정답** Finding him

---

**07.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 문장으로 만들 때 알맞은 것을 모두
고르시오. [2개]
I understood what he said.
I answered his question.
Understood what he said, I answered his
question.
Understanding what he said, I answered his
question.
Because I understood what he said, I
answered his question.
Because understood what he said, I answered
his question.
> **정답** Understanding what he said, I answered his question., Because I understood what he said, I answered his question.

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
__________ shocked by the news, I couldn't say
anything.
__________ interested in the play, I watched it five
times.
Am
Are
Being
Is
> **정답** Being

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
[2개]
그는 충분히 돈을 벌지 못하지만 행복하다.
Because he's happy, he doesn't make enough
money.
Not making enough money, he's happy.
He not making enough money, he's happy.
Although he doesn't make enough money,
he's happy.
> **정답** Although he doesn't make enough money, he's happy., Not making enough money, he's happy.

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
[2개]
Jack은 너무 어려서, 혼자 여행을 할 수 없다.
Because he is too young, Jack cannot travel
alone.
Because he is too young, Jack can travel
alone.
Being too young, Jack cannot travel alone.
Because he is not too young, Jack cannot
travel alone.
> **정답** Because he is too young, Jack cannot travel alone., Being too young, Jack cannot travel alone.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Studying not hard, you can't pass the exam.
The teacher waved her hands to them,
entering the classroom.
Not checking the email, he sent the letter.
Being shocked by the accident, he ran away.
> **정답** Studying not hard, you can't pass the exam.

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 순서대로 고르시오.
__________ the medicine, he got worse.
__________ soccer, they gathered on the playground.
No taking - Played
Not taken - Playing
Taking - Played
Not taking - Playing
> **정답** Not taking - Playing

---

**13.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
When I entered my room, I saw him playing the
computer game.
___________ my room, I saw him playing the
computer game.
Being entered
Entering
When entered
Entered
> **정답** Entering

---

**14.** 다음 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Not having anything to do, they sat still on the sofa.
As he didn't have anything to do, they sat still
on the sofa.
When we didn't have anything to do, they sat
still on the sofa.
As they didn't have anything to do, they sat
still on the sofa.
As they have anything to do, they sat still on
the sofa.
> **정답** As they didn't have anything to do, they sat still on the sofa.

---

**15.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
They said goodbye to me, and they went on a tour.
going on a tour
being going on a tour
they going on a tour
and going on a tour
> **정답** going on a tour

---

**16.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
He buried a treasure chest in his yard when
he was young. Grown up, he dug the yard.
Discovered the treasure chest, he was very
excited.
> **정답** buried, Growing, Discovering

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Walked along the street, I
found a wonderful view.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Walked → Walking

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Liking not swimming, I didn't
go to the swimming pool.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Liking not → Not liking

---

**19.** 다음 두 문장의 뜻이 같게 할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 고쳐
쓰시오.
Sally usually listens to music, solving difficult
math problems.
→ Sally usually listens to music, when she
solved difficult math problems.
> **정답** listens, solves

---

**20.** 다음 두 문장의 뜻이 같게 할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 고쳐
쓰시오.
Although he was injured in the war, he continued
to serve as a soldier.
→ Was injured in the war, he continued
to serve as a soldier.
> **정답** Being, continued
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 142 분사구문 만드는 법중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꿀 때 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
While she played the piano, she sang a song.
→  (     ) , she sang a song.
정답 Playing the piano

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꿀 때 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
He breathes heavily as he climbs the mountain.
→ He breathes heavily,  (     ) .
정답 climbing the mountain

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꿀 때 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
I chatted with my friend because I was stressed.
→ I chatted with my friend,  (     ) .
정답 being stressed

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꿀 때 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
Although he didn't like chess, he played chess with
his brother.
→  (     ) , he played chess with his
brother.
정답 Not liking chess (Never liking chess)

---

**05.** 다음 분사구문을 부사절로 바꾸시오.
Turning to the left, you will find the bakery on your
right.
→ If  (     ) , you will
find the bakery on your right.
정답 you turn to the left

---

**06.** 다음 분사구문을 부사절로 바꾸시오.
Reading the newspaper, I knew about the
accident.
→ When  (     ) , I
knew about the accident.
정답 I read the newspaper

---

**07.** 다음 분사구문을 부사절로 바꾸시오.
Feeling tired, I went to bed early.
→ Because  (     ) , I went to bed early.
정답 I felt tired

---

**08.** 다음 분사구문을 부사절로 바꾸시오.
Listening to the bird song, he went out of the
room.
→ While  (     ) , he
went out of the room.
정답 he listened to the bird song (he was listening to the
bird song)

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 바르게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
만약 이 수업을 듣지 않는다면 너는 졸업하지 못할 것이다.
힌트 (     ) taking, not, class, this
  (     )   (     )   (     ) , you won't graduate.
정답 Not, taking, this, class

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 바르게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
충분한 돈이 없어서 나는 좋은 선물을 사지 못했다.
[enough, having, money, not].
I couldn't buy a good present,  (     )   (     )  
.
정답 not, having, enough, money

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 142: 분사구문 만드는 법 - 변형문제

**01.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If you arrive at the library, you will find her there. ___________ at the library, you will find her there.
Arriving To arrive Arrived Arrive
> 정답: Arriving

---

**02.** 다음 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Being sick, I didn't go to the field trip last Friday.
Though I was sicking, I don't go to the field trip last Friday.
Because I was sick, I didn't go to the field trip last Friday.
Though I was sick, I didn't go to the field trip last Friday.
Because I am sick, I didn't go to the field trip last Friday.
> 정답: Because I was sick, I didn't go to the field trip last

---

**03.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Although she had a busy schedule, she helped her classmates.
she having a busy schedule Had a busy schedule Have a busy schedule Having a busy schedule
> 정답: Having a busy schedule

---

**04.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
When she didn't study in the classroom, she listened to podcasts. __________________________________, she listened to podcasts.
Studying not in the classroom.
Studying in the classroom.
Not studying in the classroom.
Not study in the classroom.
> 정답: Not studying in the classroom.

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Having a headache, she was absent from class.
That she had a headache And she had a headache Although she had a headache Because she had a headache
> 정답: Because she had a headache

---

**06.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
As soon as I noticed him, I waved at him.
I noticing him Noticed him Noticing him I noticed him
> 정답: Noticing him

---

**07.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 문장으로 만들 때 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I understood the directions.
I found the building.
Understood the directions, I found the building.
Understanding the directions, I found the building.
Because I understood the directions, I found the building.
Because understood the directions, I found the building.
> 정답: Understanding the directions, I found the building.

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
__________ amazed by the performance, I couldn't stop clapping. __________ fascinated by the painting, I stared at it for hours.
Am Are Being Is
> 정답: Being

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오. [2개]
그녀는 충분히 잠을 자지 못하지만 활기차다.
Because she's energetic, she doesn't get enough sleep.
Not getting enough sleep, she's energetic.
She not getting enough sleep, she's energetic.
Although she doesn't get enough sleep, she's energetic.
> 정답: Although she doesn't get enough sleep, she's

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오. [2개]
Amy는 너무 어려서, 혼자 요리를 할 수 없다.
Because she is too young, Amy cannot cook alone.
Because she is too young, Amy can cook alone.
Being too young, Amy cannot cook alone.
Because she is not too young, Amy cannot cook alone.
> 정답: Because she is too young, Amy cannot cook alone.,

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Practicing not hard, you can't win the match.
The coach waved his hand to them, entering the gym.
Not reading the notice, she missed the meeting.
Being frightened by the thunder, she hid under the desk.
> 정답: Practicing not hard, you can't win the match.

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 순서대로 고르시오.
__________ the homework, he got a low grade. __________ basketball, they gathered on the court.
No doing - Played Not done - Playing Doing - Played Not doing - Playing
> 정답: Not doing - Playing

---

**13.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
When I opened the door, I saw her reading a novel. ___________ the door, I saw her reading a novel.
Being opened Opening When opened Opened
> 정답: Opening

---

**14.** 다음 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Not having anything to eat, they sat quietly at the table.
As he didn't have anything to eat, they sat quietly at the table.
When we didn't have anything to eat, they sat quietly at the table.
As they didn't have anything to eat, they sat quietly at the table. the table.
As they have anything to eat, they sat quietly at the table.
> 정답: As they didn't have anything to eat, they sat quietly at the table.

---

**15.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
They said goodbye to us, and they went on a hike.
going on a hike being going on a hike they going on a hike and going on a hike
> 정답: going on a hike

---

**16.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
She hid a time capsule in the garden when she was young.
Grown up, she dug the garden.
Discovered the time capsule, she was very excited.
> 정답: hid, Growing, Discovering

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Walked  along  the  beach,  I  found  a  beautiful  shell. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: Walked → Walking

---
